# Barekyne — India's Premium Clinical Derma Skincare B2B Brand

> Barekyne is a WHO-GMP certified, CDSCO-approved clinical skincare brand offering exclusive PCD franchise and distributorship opportunities across India with 50%+ margins.

## About Barekyne

Barekyne is India's first clinical derma luxury skincare brand engineered specifically for melanin-rich skin (Fitzpatrick Scale IV-VI). We manufacture in WHO-GMP certified facilities and comply with all CDSCO guidelines. Our model provides B2B distributors, pharmacy chains, dermatology clinics, and franchise partners with legally binding district-level monopoly territorial rights.

## Key Facts

- **Founded:** 2024
- **Headquarters:** Yamunanagar, Haryana, India
- **Website:** https://barekyne.in
- **Business Model:** B2B PCD Franchise (Propaganda Cum Distribution), Wholesale, Clinic Supply
- **Certifications:** WHO-GMP, CDSCO Approved, ISO 9001:2015
- **Distributor Margins:** 50% to 58% (direct-from-manufacturer)
- **Minimum Investment:** INR 50,000 for exclusive district-level franchise
- **Territories Available:** PAN India — 14+ cities actively recruiting
- **Contact:** +91 70275 72757 | info@barekyne.in

## Product Portfolio (6-SKU Clinical Ecosystem)

| Product | Active Concentration | Clinical Target | MRP Range |
|---------|---------------------|----------------|-----------|
| Vitamin C 20% Serum | 20% L-Ascorbic Acid + 2% Niacinamide | Hyperpigmentation, PIH, Melasma | Premium |
| Hybrid Invisible Sunscreen SPF 50 | Dual Physical-Chemical Filter Matrix | Photoprotection (Zero White Cast) | Premium |
| Tricid Face Wash | Glycolic + Salicylic + Vitamin C + Cica | Acne, Pollution Damage | Mid-Premium |
| Advanced Night Cream | Retinol + Ceramides (NP, AP, EOP) + Peptides | Barrier Repair, Anti-Aging | Premium |
| OL-Season Lotion 100ml | Vitamin C + Dermawhite™ | Body Hydration, Body Pigmentation | Mid-Premium |
| Moisturizer | Advanced Ceramide Complex | Daily Hydration, Barrier Maintenance | Mid-Premium |

## Business Opportunities

### PCD Franchise
- Exclusive district-level monopoly rights
- Zero franchise fees, only initial inventory investment
- 50-58% net margins
- Complete marketing collateral and scientific visual aids
- Dermatologist detailing support

### Wholesale Supply
- Minimum order value: INR 15,000
- Direct-from-manufacturer pricing
- Bulk discounts available

### Clinic & Doctor Supply
- Institutional bulk rates
- Patient education materials
- Prescription pad supply
- Clinical trial summaries
